Chen Yi йҷізҰ•
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Yi (йҷізҰ•). Protected Empress Bian but joined in Wei FengвҖҷs plot. Then revealed the plot out of fear. Chen Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
